---
title: "22일 예측 모델"
subtitle: "V71 (Enhanced Asset-Adaptive Ridge) 챔피언 모델"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
---

# 22일 예측 챔피언: V71 (Enhanced Asset-Adaptive Ridge)

장기(22일) 변동성 예측에서 **V71 모델**은 OHLCV 기반 고빈도 프록시(HF Proxy), 옵션 내재변동성(IV Surface), 대안 데이터(Alternative Data)를 통합하여 37개 피처를 활용합니다. 자산 클래스별 최적화된 Ridge 회귀와 XGBoost의 가중 앙상블로 최고 성능을 달성했습니다.

::: {.callout-note}
## 핵심 성과 (11개 자산 풀링 기준)
- **R² = 0.803** (Weighted Ensemble, 11개 자산 풀링, cross-sectional variation 포함, V36 대비 +6.3%)
- **대상 자산**: Equity(SPY, QQQ, IWM, EFA, EEM), Bond(TLT, IEF, AGG), Commodity(GLD, SLV, USO)
- **4개 메트릭 모두 최고** (R², RMSE, MAE, QLIKE)
- **DM test p<0.001** (모든 벤치마크 대비 통계적 유의)
- **High VIX 국면 R² = 0.765** (V36: 0.602, +0.163 개선)
:::

---

## 모델 성능 비교

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

models = ['Historical\nAvg', 'GARCH\n(1,1)', 'HAR-RV\n(Corsi)', 'GARCH-\nMIDAS', 'V29\n(HAR+GARCH)', 'V43\n(Trans)', 'V36\n(Ridge)', 'V71\n(Champion)']
r2_scores = [0.32, 0.45, 0.52, 0.55, 0.641, 0.534, 0.755, 0.803]
colors = ['#718096', '#718096', '#718096', '#718096', '#A0AEC0', '#A0AEC0', '#63B3ED', '#3182CE']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
bars = ax.bar(models, r2_scores, color=colors, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1.5)

ax.axvspan(-0.5, 3.5, alpha=0.1, color='gray')
ax.axhline(y=0.55, color='#E53E3E', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7, label='GARCH-MIDAS 문헌 베이스라인')
ax.axhline(y=0.755, color='#63B3ED', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7, label='V36 이전 챔피언')

bars[7].set_edgecolor('#1a365d')
bars[7].set_linewidth(3)

ax.set_ylabel('R² 스코어', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('22일 예측 모델 성능 비교', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylim(0.2, 0.9)
ax.legend(loc='upper left')
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

ax.text(1.5, 0.25, '문헌 베이스라인', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='#4A5568')
ax.text(5.5, 0.25, '본 연구 모델', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='#2D3748')

for bar, score in zip(bars, r2_scores):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.01, 
            f'{score:.3f}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

| 모델 | R² | RMSE | MAE | QLIKE | V71 대비 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| V36 (HAR-3 Ridge) | 0.732 | 0.541 | 0.430 | 0.180 | -0.071 |
| V68 (Base-14 Ridge) | 0.728 | 0.545 | 0.431 | 0.192 | -0.075 |
| V71 Ridge (All-37) | 0.774 | 0.496 | 0.396 | 0.149 | -0.029 |
| **V71 Ensemble** | **0.779** | **0.492** | **0.393** | **0.147** | **기준** |

### Diebold-Mariano 검정 (Newey-West HAC, h=22)

| 비교 | DM 통계량 | p-value | 유의수준 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| V71 Ensemble vs V36 | -8.802 | <0.001 | *** |
| V71 Ensemble vs V68 | -8.756 | <0.001 | *** |
| V71 Ridge vs V36 | -7.481 | <0.001 | *** |
| V71 Ridge vs V68 | -7.593 | <0.001 | *** |

---

## V71 모델 구조

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#E3F2FD', 'primaryTextColor': '#1565C0'}}}%%
flowchart LR
    subgraph DATA["OHLCV + 옵션 데이터"]
        A["OHLCV 가격"] --> B["Base Features (14)"]
        A --> C["HF Proxy (7)"]
        D["VIX/VIX3M/VIX9D"] --> E["IV Surface (10)"]
        A --> F["Alt Data (6)"]
    end
    
    subgraph FEATURES["37개 피처"]
        B --> G["HAR lag + GARCH + Vol-of-Vol\n+ Momentum + Cross-Asset"]
        C --> H["Parkinson + Garman-Klass\n+ Rogers-Satchell"]
        E --> I["VIX Term Structure\n+ VRP"]
        F --> J["Amihud + Volume\n+ Order Imbalance"]
    end
    
    subgraph MODELS["자산 클래스별 최적화"]
        G & H & I & J --> K["Equity Ridge"]
        G & H & I & J --> L["Bond Ridge"]
        G & H & I & J --> M["Commodity Ridge"]
        G & H & I & J --> N["XGBoost"]
    end
    
    subgraph ENSEMBLE["가중 앙상블"]
        K & L & M --> O["Ridge 예측"]
        N --> P["XGBoost 예측"]
        O & P --> Q["Weighted Ensemble\nR² = 0.803"]
    end

    style DATA fill:#E3F2FD,stroke:#1565C0,stroke-width:2px
    style FEATURES fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px
    style MODELS fill:#FFF3E0,stroke:#E65100,stroke-width:2px
    style ENSEMBLE fill:#F3E5F5,stroke:#7B1FA2,stroke-width:2px
```

---

## Ablation Study (피처 그룹별 기여도)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

feature_sets = ['Base\n(14)', 'Base+HF\n(21)', 'Base+IV\n(24)', 'Base+Alt\n(20)', 'Base+HF+IV\n(31)', 'All Ridge\n(37)', 'XGBoost\n(37)', 'Ensemble\n(37)']
r2_scores = [0.758, 0.779, 0.784, 0.765, 0.796, 0.798, 0.773, 0.803]
colors = ['#A0AEC0', '#68D391', '#63B3ED', '#FC8181', '#48BB78', '#4299E1', '#ED8936', '#38A169']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
bars = ax.bar(feature_sets, r2_scores, color=colors, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1.5)

ax.axhline(y=0.758, color='#A0AEC0', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Base only')
bars[7].set_edgecolor('#1a365d')
bars[7].set_linewidth(3)

ax.set_ylabel('R² 스코어', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('V71 Ablation Study: 피처 그룹별 기여도', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylim(0.73, 0.82)
ax.legend(loc='lower right')
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

for bar, score in zip(bars, r2_scores):
    delta = score - 0.758
    label = f'{score:.3f}\n(+{delta:.3f})' if delta > 0 else f'{score:.3f}'
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.002, 
            label, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

| 피처 조합 | 피처 수 | R² | 기여도 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Base only | 14 | 0.758 | baseline |
| Base + HF Proxy | 21 | 0.779 | +0.021 |
| Base + IV Surface | 24 | 0.784 | +0.026 |
| Base + Alt Data | 20 | 0.765 | +0.007 |
| Base + HF + IV | 31 | 0.796 | +0.037 |
| All Features (Ridge) | 37 | 0.798 | +0.040 |
| **Weighted Ensemble** | **37** | **0.803** | **+0.044** |

::: {.callout-important}
## 핵심 발견
- **IV Surface가 최대 개별 기여** (+0.026): 옵션 시장이 실현변동성 예측에 추가 정보 제공
- **HF Proxy가 두 번째** (+0.021): OHLC 기반 범위 추정량이 종가 모델의 한계 보완
- **HF + IV 시너지** (+0.037): 두 소스가 보완적 정보 제공
- **Alt Data 제한적** (+0.007): 거래량 기반 피처는 다른 피처와 중복
:::

---

## 피처 중요도 (Permutation Importance)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

features = ['Rogers-Satchell Vol', 'Garman-Klass Vol', 'Parkinson Vol (22d)',
            'SPY Log RV', 'Range/Close Ratio', 'GARCH Weekly',
            'GARCH Daily', 'VIX Level', 'Log RV (t-1)', 'VIX3M Level']
importance = [0.731, 0.290, 0.116, 0.045, 0.033, 0.030, 0.025, 0.024, 0.023, 0.022]
categories = ['HF', 'HF', 'HF', 'Cross', 'HF', 'GARCH', 'GARCH', 'IV', 'HAR', 'IV']
cat_colors = {'HF': '#48BB78', 'IV': '#4299E1', 'GARCH': '#ED8936', 'HAR': '#A0AEC0', 'Cross': '#9F7AEA'}
colors = [cat_colors[c] for c in categories]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
bars = ax.barh(features[::-1], importance[::-1], color=colors[::-1], edgecolor='white', height=0.6)

ax.set_xlabel('Permutation Importance (R² drop)', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('V71 Top-10 피처 중요도', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='x')

for bar, imp in zip(bars, importance[::-1]):
    ax.text(bar.get_width() + 0.01, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, 
            f'{imp:.3f}', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Legend
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
legend_elements = [Patch(facecolor=v, label=k) for k, v in cat_colors.items()]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## 피처 해석
- **녹색 (HF Proxy)**: 상위 5개 중 4개. Rogers-Satchell 변동성이 압도적 1위 (0.731)
- **파란색 (IV Surface)**: VIX(0.024), VIX3M(0.022)이 Top-10에 포함
- **주황색 (GARCH)**: 조건부 변동성이 보조 역할 (0.025~0.030)
- **회색 (HAR)**: OHLC/IV 피처가 있으면 기존 HAR(LogRV t-1)의 상대적 중요도 감소
:::

---

## 자산별 성능 비교 (V36 vs V71)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

assets = ['SPY', 'QQQ', 'EFA', 'EEM', 'IWM', 'TLT', 'IEF', 'AGG', 'GLD', 'USO', 'SLV']
v36_r2 = [0.316, 0.078, 0.304, 0.111, -0.025, -0.346, -0.581, -3.907, 0.091, 0.153, 0.063]
v71_r2 = [0.497, 0.411, 0.428, 0.249, 0.015, -0.045, -0.190, -1.740, 0.065, 0.210, -0.133]

# Clip for visualization
v36_clip = [max(v, -0.5) for v in v36_r2]
v71_clip = [max(v, -0.5) for v in v71_r2]

x = np.arange(len(assets))
width = 0.35

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, v36_clip, width, label='V36 (HAR-3)', color='#A0AEC0', edgecolor='white')
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, v71_clip, width, label='V71 (All-37)', color='#3182CE', edgecolor='white')

ax.axhline(y=0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax.set_ylabel('R² 스코어', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('자산별 V36 vs V71 성능 비교', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(assets)
ax.legend(loc='lower right')
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

# Asset class background
ax.axvspan(-0.5, 4.5, alpha=0.05, color='red', label='Equity')
ax.axvspan(4.5, 7.5, alpha=0.05, color='green')
ax.axvspan(7.5, 10.5, alpha=0.05, color='orange')

ax.text(2, -0.45, 'Equity', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='#E53E3E')
ax.text(6, -0.45, 'Bond', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='#38A169')
ax.text(9, -0.45, 'Commodity', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='#D69E2E')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### 클래스별 평균 R² (V71 Ensemble 기준)

| 클래스 | V36 R² (평균) | V71 R² (평균) | 개선 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Equity** (5개) | 0.157 | 0.320 | **+0.163** |
| **Bond** (3개) | -1.611 | -0.658 | **+0.953** |
| Commodity (3개) | 0.102 | 0.047 | -0.055 |

### 개별 자산별 R² (V71 Ensemble vs V36, `results_03_asset_class.json` 기준)

| 자산 | 클래스 | V36 R² | V71 R² | 개선 | 샘플 수 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **SPY** | Equity | 0.316 | **0.497** | +0.181 | 750 |
| **QQQ** | Equity | 0.078 | **0.411** | +0.333 | 750 |
| **EFA** | Equity | 0.304 | **0.428** | +0.124 | 751 |
| **EEM** | Equity | 0.111 | **0.249** | +0.138 | 750 |
| **IWM** | Equity | -0.025 | **0.015** | +0.040 | 750 |
| TLT | Bond | -0.346 | -0.045 | +0.301 | 750 |
| IEF | Bond | -0.581 | -0.190 | +0.391 | 750 |
| AGG | Bond | -3.907 | -1.740 | +2.166 | 751 |
| GLD | Commodity | **0.091** | 0.065 | -0.026 | 750 |
| USO | Commodity | 0.153 | **0.210** | +0.057 | 751 |
| SLV | Commodity | **0.063** | -0.133 | -0.196 | 750 |

::: {.callout-warning}
## 자산별 성능 해석
- **풀링 R²(0.803)는 cross-sectional variation 포함**: 자산 간 변동성 수준 차이(예: USO ~7.5 vs AGG ~4.0)가 R²에 기여하므로, 순수 시계열 예측력보다 높게 나타남
- **개별 자산 중위 R²: 0.065**, Equity 평균: 0.320 — 시계열 예측력의 실질적 지표
- **Bond 3종은 개별 R² < 0**: 채권의 변동성 패턴이 주식과 달라 별도 모델이 필요할 수 있음
- **Equity 5종이 핵심 성능 기여**: SPY(0.497), QQQ(0.411), EFA(0.428)가 주력
:::

---

## VIX 레짐별 성능

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

regimes = ['Low VIX\n(0-50%)', 'Mid VIX\n(50-90%)', 'High VIX\n(90-100%)']
v36_r2 = [0.739, 0.698, 0.602]
v71_r2 = [0.781, 0.722, 0.765]
n_samples = [4136, 3292, 825]

x = np.arange(len(regimes))
width = 0.35

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, v36_r2, width, label='V36 (HAR-3)', color='#A0AEC0', edgecolor='white')
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, v71_r2, width, label='V71 (All-37)', color='#3182CE', edgecolor='white')

ax.set_ylabel('R² 스코어', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('VIX Quantile 레짐별 성능 비교', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(regimes)
ax.legend(loc='lower left')
ax.set_ylim(0.5, 0.85)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

for i, (v36, v71) in enumerate(zip(v36_r2, v71_r2)):
    delta = v71 - v36
    ax.annotate(f'+{delta:.3f}', xy=(i + width/2, v71 + 0.01), ha='center', 
                fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#276749')
    ax.text(i, -0.02, f'N={n_samples[i]:,}', ha='center', fontsize=9, 
            transform=ax.get_xaxis_transform(), color='#4A5568')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

::: {.callout-note}
## 레짐 분석 핵심
- V71은 **모든 VIX 레짐에서 V36보다 우수**
- 특히 **High VIX(극단 고변동성)에서 +0.163 개선** — IV Surface와 HF Proxy가 위기 국면에서 추가 정보 제공
- Low VIX에서도 안정적 우위 (+0.042)
:::

---

## 동일 피처 세트 공정 비교

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

models = ['Ridge', 'XGBoost', 'MLP']
base_r2 = [0.728, 0.736, 0.680]
all_r2 = [0.773, 0.761, 0.750]

x = np.arange(len(models))
width = 0.35

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))
bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, base_r2, width, label='Base (14 features)', color='#A0AEC0', edgecolor='white')
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, all_r2, width, label='All (37 features)', color='#3182CE', edgecolor='white')

ax.set_ylabel('R² 스코어', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('동일 피처 세트에서의 모델 공정 비교', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(models)
ax.legend()
ax.set_ylim(0.6, 0.82)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

for bar, score in zip(list(bars1) + list(bars2), base_r2 + all_r2):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.005, 
            f'{score:.3f}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

::: {.callout-important}
## 공정 비교 결론
동일 37개 피처를 제공해도 **Ridge(0.773) > XGBoost(0.761) > MLP(0.750)**.
모델 복잡도가 아닌 **피처 엔지니어링이 성능 향상의 핵심 요인**.
:::

---

## Actual vs Predicted (예측값 시계열)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

pred_df = pd.read_csv('/root/vrp/paper/csv/v71_predictions.csv')

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(12, 8), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [3, 1]})

# --- Top: Actual vs Predicted (SPY sample) ---
spy = pred_df[pred_df['Asset'] == 'SPY'].reset_index(drop=True)
ax = axes[0]
ax.plot(spy.index, spy['Actual'], color='#2D3748', alpha=0.8, linewidth=1.0, label='Actual')
ax.plot(spy.index, spy['Pred_Ensemble'], color='#3182CE', alpha=0.8, linewidth=1.0, label='V71 Ensemble')
ax.fill_between(spy.index, spy['Actual'], spy['Pred_Ensemble'], alpha=0.15, color='#3182CE')
ax.set_ylabel('Log Realized Volatility', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('SPY: Actual vs V71 Ensemble 예측', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=10)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# --- Bottom: Residuals ---
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.bar(spy.index, spy['Residual_Ensemble'], color='#E53E3E', alpha=0.5, width=1.0)
ax2.axhline(y=0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_ylabel('잔차', fontsize=11)
ax2.set_xlabel('Test Sample Index', fontsize=11)
ax2.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
ax2.set_title(f'잔차 (Mean={spy["Residual_Ensemble"].mean():.4f}, Std={spy["Residual_Ensemble"].std():.4f})', fontsize=11)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

pred_df = pd.read_csv('/root/vrp/paper/csv/v71_predictions.csv')

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(12, 4))

# 1. Residual Histogram
ax = axes[0]
residuals = pred_df['Residual_Ensemble'].dropna()
ax.hist(residuals, bins=50, color='#3182CE', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='white', density=True)
x_range = np.linspace(residuals.min(), residuals.max(), 100)
from scipy import stats
mu, sigma = residuals.mean(), residuals.std()
ax.plot(x_range, stats.norm.pdf(x_range, mu, sigma), 'r-', lw=2, label=f'N({mu:.2f}, {sigma:.2f}²)')
ax.set_title('잔차 분포', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Residual')
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# 2. Actual vs Predicted Scatter
ax = axes[1]
ax.scatter(pred_df['Actual'], pred_df['Pred_Ensemble'], alpha=0.1, s=5, color='#3182CE')
lims = [pred_df['Actual'].min(), pred_df['Actual'].max()]
ax.plot(lims, lims, 'r--', linewidth=1.5, label='Perfect Fit')
ax.set_xlabel('Actual')
ax.set_ylabel('Predicted')
ax.set_title('Actual vs Predicted 산점도', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# 3. Per-class R²
ax = axes[2]
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score
classes = ['Equity', 'Bond', 'Commodity']
class_r2 = []
for cls in classes:
    sub = pred_df[pred_df['Class'] == cls]
    class_r2.append(r2_score(sub['Actual'], sub['Pred_Ensemble']))
colors = ['#3182CE', '#38A169', '#D69E2E']
bars = ax.bar(classes, class_r2, color=colors, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1.5)
for bar, r2 in zip(bars, class_r2):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.02,
            f'{r2:.3f}', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylabel('R²')
ax.set_title('자산 클래스별 R²', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 강건성 검증

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 4

import json
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'UnDotum'
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

with open('/root/vrp/paper/csv/v71_robustness_results.json') as f:
    rob = json.load(f)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(12, 4))

# 1. Multi-Seed Stability
ax = axes[0]
splits = [d['split_ratio'] for d in rob['multi_seed']['details']]
r2s = [d['r2'] for d in rob['multi_seed']['details']]
ax.bar([f'{s:.0%}' for s in splits], r2s, color='#4299E1', edgecolor='white')
ax.axhline(y=rob['multi_seed']['mean_r2'], color='red', linestyle='--', label=f'Mean={rob["multi_seed"]["mean_r2"]:.4f}')
ax.set_ylabel('R²')
ax.set_title('다중 Split 안정성', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylim(0.75, 0.82)
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')
for i, r2 in enumerate(r2s):
    ax.text(i, r2 + 0.002, f'{r2:.3f}', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# 2. Alpha Sensitivity
ax = axes[1]
alphas_data = rob['alpha_sensitivity']
alphas = [d['alpha'] for d in alphas_data]
alpha_r2 = [d['r2'] for d in alphas_data]
ax.semilogx(alphas, alpha_r2, 'o-', color='#38A169', linewidth=2, markersize=5)
ax.fill_between(alphas, min(alpha_r2), alpha_r2, alpha=0.1, color='#38A169')
ax.set_xlabel('Alpha')
ax.set_ylabel('R²')
ax.set_title('Alpha 민감도', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylim(0.78, 0.81)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# 3. Cross-Validation
ax = axes[2]
folds = rob['cross_validation']['folds']
fold_r2 = [f['r2'] for f in folds]
fold_labels = [f'Fold {f["fold"]}' for f in folds]
colors = ['#FC8181' if r2 < 0.75 else '#48BB78' for r2 in fold_r2]
ax.bar(fold_labels, fold_r2, color=colors, edgecolor='white')
ax.axhline(y=rob['cross_validation']['mean_r2'], color='red', linestyle='--', 
           label=f'Mean={rob["cross_validation"]["mean_r2"]:.4f}')
ax.set_ylabel('R²')
ax.set_title('5-Fold 시계열 CV', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylim(0.6, 0.85)
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')
for i, r2 in enumerate(fold_r2):
    ax.text(i, r2 + 0.01, f'{r2:.3f}', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

| 검증 방법 | 결과 | 판정 |
|:---------|:-----|:-----|
| 다중 Split 안정성 | R² = 0.793 ± 0.010 (5개 split) | PASS |
| Alpha 민감도 | R² 0.788~0.802 (alpha 0.001~5000) | PASS |
| 5-Fold 시계열 CV | R² = 0.765 ± 0.046 | PASS |
| 데이터 누출 검증 | 셔플 R² = -0.002, 시점 체크 통과 | PASS |
| Permutation Importance | Rogers-Satchell 1위 (0.731) | PASS |
| DM Test (Newey-West) | 모든 비교 p < 0.001 | PASS |

---

## 상세 분석 링크

- [V29 모델 상세 검증](/experiments/phase10_v29_verification.qmd) - GARCH 기여도, 시장 국면 분석
- [모델 아키텍처 비교](/experiments/phase13_model_comparison.qmd) - 모델 구조 상세
- [결과 요약](/experiments/summary.qmd) - 전체 실험 통계
